coins.name: Coins
coins.description: Tax revenue and liquid cash used for almost every project.

residents.name: Residents
residents.description: Population capacity. Residents unlock districts but are never spent.

food.name: Food
food.description: Harvests and pantry stock that keep homes, visitors, and advanced habitats running.

timber.name: Timber
timber.description: Lumber for framing, mills, terraces, and midgame housing.

stone.name: Stone
stone.description: Quarried masonry needed for civic, industrial, and landmark construction.

goods.name: Goods
goods.description: Crafted wares and freight used by policy offices, tourism, and higher-tier builds.

power.name: Power
power.description: Electrical and mechanical capacity for modern and engineered districts.

knowledge.name: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Surveying, schooling, and technical expertise that unlocks advanced designs.

appeal.name: Appeal
appeal.description: Cultural pull generated by landmarks, resorts, and scenic districts.

influence.name: Influence
influence.description: Political and social leverage produced by the borough's most visible districts.
